# Ollie Pinto

Canonical site: https://www.olliepinto.com/

Ollie Pinto is a London-based full-stack B2B marketer with a creative-technical foundation in video, design, UX, automation, and AI-powered marketing systems.

## Key routes

- Home: https://www.olliepinto.com/
- Contact: https://www.olliepinto.com/contact
- Privacy: https://www.olliepinto.com/privacy
- Sitemap: https://www.olliepinto.com/sitemap-index.xml

## External profiles

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/oliver-pinto/
- Substack: https://olliepinto.substack.com/

## Use

This site is intended to be discoverable as a public personal portfolio and professional profile. Please respect robots.txt crawler guidance, especially for identifiable training-oriented crawlers.
